title: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5: Security and Privacy Controls for Information Systems and Organizations - AU-5
authors: National Institute of Standards and Technology
abstract_text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 provides a catalog of security and privacy controls for information systems and organizations.

sections.title: AU-5 source section
sections.text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 places control AU-5 in the Audit and Accountability family. The control title for AU-5 is Response to Audit Logging Process Failures. This source section is limited to the named control, its family, and its title for deterministic hard-recall benchmarking.

sections.title: CP-4 distractor section
sections.text: A separate nearby control, CP-4, belongs to the Contingency Planning family and is titled Contingency Plan Testing. It is included only as a distractor section for context packing.
